title: Waterproof Field Notebook Pocket Size 3x5 with Pencil 50 Sheet Outdoor Pad
description:
Now your notebook can go anywhere with you! Introducing the waterproof, smudge-poof, pocket-sized notebook from SE. Whether your'e camping, hiking, boating, fishing, or swimming, you can record anything into this journal without having to worry about it getting wet or smearing.

This notebook is compact and easy to transport and store at 3" x 5", but still has a full 50 sheets! It can easily be carried in any bag, backpack or pocket. The bright green cover makes it easy to spot and ideal for signalling in emergencies.

Notebook includes a compact graphite pencil. Whether its rain, hail, or snow, this notebook has you covered!
Irongate American Supply

Waterproof Pocket Journal 3x5 Camping Hiking Boating Fishing Field Notes Notebook

MSRP 14.99

Take notes anywhere, in any weather, with this compact waterproof pocket notebook from SE. Designed for outdoor use, field notes, camping, hiking, fishing, boating, hunting, survival kits, emergency preparedness and everyday carry, this durable 3" x 5" notebook lets you write down important information without worrying about rain, splashes or damp conditions ruining your notes.

The waterproof pages are designed to resist smudging and moisture, making this small field notebook ideal for use in wet, rugged or unpredictable environments. Whether you are recording trail notes, fishing spots, campsite details, measurements, weather observations, emergency information or quick reminders, this notebook is built to go wherever your adventure takes you.

Its compact pocket-size design makes it easy to carry in a backpack, tackle box, tool bag, glove compartment, survival pouch, camping kit or shirt pocket. Despite its small size, the notebook includes 50 sheets, giving you plenty of space for notes while keeping your gear lightweight and organized.

The bright green cover is easy to spot in a bag or outdoor setting and can also help with visibility in emergency situations. A compact graphite pencil is included, so you have a ready-to-use writing tool right out of the package.

From rain and snow to boating, hiking and jobsite use, this SE waterproof pocket notebook is a practical choice for outdoor enthusiasts, field workers, campers, anglers, hunters, backpackers and anyone who needs reliable notes on the go.

Product Details

MPN: SS1232
UPC: 706569089806
Features: Waterproof Outdoor Notebook
Designed for use in wet, rainy and rugged environments, this waterproof pocket notebook helps keep your notes protected during camping, hiking, fishing, boating, hunting and other outdoor activities.
Compact 3" x 5" Pocket Size
Small enough to fit in a pocket, backpack, tackle box, glove compartment, emergency kit or field bag while still providing plenty of writing space for quick notes and observations.
50 Sheet Field Journal
Includes 50 sheets for recording trail notes, measurements, campsite details, fishing logs, weather conditions, emergency information, job site notes and everyday reminders.
Smudge-Resistant Writing Surface
Pages are designed to help reduce smearing and moisture damage, making this notebook useful for field work, outdoor recreation and unpredictable weather conditions.
Bright Green Cover with Pencil Included
The high-visibility green cover is easy to locate in your gear, while the included compact graphite pencil makes this notebook ready for immediate use.
